title: KJ Somaiya College Results 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: KJ Somaiya College Results 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: KJ Somaiya College has released the 2026 results for FYBA, FYBCom 1st Merit List, and BCom Semester 3 & 4 ATKT on May 26, 2026, at the official website somaiya.edu.in. Students can check the direct result link and follow the steps provided to download their results.

content.text: KJ Somaiya College has officially released the KJ Somaiya College Merit List 2026 along with multiple examination results for the academic session 2026-27. The first merit list for FYBA, FYBCom, BSc, and BCom courses for external students has been published on 26 May 2026. Additionally, BCom Semester III and IV ATKT results for April and March 2026 have also been declared.

KJ Somaiya College Result 2026 has been released online on the official website - https://www.somaiya.edu.in/. The results include undergraduate merit lists and semester ATKT results for courses like B.A, B.Com, and B.Sc. Students can check and download their results directly in PDF format without login credentials from the official portal.

Candidates are advised to carefully verify their details such as name, marks, and eligibility status in the merit list or result PDFs. In case of any discrepancies, they should immediately contact the college authorities.

sections.heading: KJ Somaiya College Results 2026 Key Highlights

content.text: KJ Somaiya College has released the FYBA, FYBCom, BSc, and BCom 1st Merit List along with BCom Semester III and IV ATKT Results 2026. Students can access all results online through the official website in PDF format.

sections.heading: KJ Somaiya College Result 2026 Direct Link

content.text: KJ Somaiya College has activated the direct links to check the FYBA, FYBCom, BSc, and BCom merit lists and semester ATKT results. Students can view or download their results instantly through the official portal using the links provided below.

links.label: FYBA and FYBCom First Merit List 2026 (External Students)
BCom Semester III NEP ATKT Result April 2026
BCom Semester III Old ATKT Result April 2026
BCom Semester IV ATKT Result March 2026
BCom Semester IV NEP ATKT Result March 2026

sections.heading: How to Check KJ Somaiya College Result 2026

content.text: Follow these steps to check and download the KJ Somaiya College Merit List and Result 2026:

items: Navigate to the "Merit List" or "Examination" section
Click on the relevant merit list or result link
The PDF file will open on the screen
Search your name or roll number using Ctrl + F
Download and save the result for future reference
